subject: M:Attempted to divide by zero.
body:
Hi Dimitry,
    I am trying to refine using M with a star file refined in Relion3.1 
(which has already downgrade). When I try to refine the species, M crashes 
and gives this error: 

   * Something went wrong during refinement. Sorry! Here are the details:*
    *System.DivideByZeroException: Attempted to divide by zero.*

    The previous steps seem to be all right. I tried to refine using M on 
NVIDIA GTX 2070 and 3090, but it didn't work. Do you have any ideas what is 
causing this error and how can I fix it?   

Best wish,
Zheyuan Zhang

[image: M crash2.jpg]
